title: Bahrain Domain Registry Privacy Policy
summary: Applies the Personal Data Protection Law to registry user information and describes collection, device and network data, location data, use, retention, security and user update practices for registry digital services.

theme_notes.telecom_digital_infrastructure.internet_: Privacy policy for Bahrain Domain Registry services.

notes: Related instruments: Related to Law No. 30 of 2018 with Respect to Personal Data Protection Law
